steps.action: Open app and navigate from sign-in page to registration
steps.expected: Registration surface is available for first-time user
steps.observed: Register page loaded with Name/Email/Password form

steps.expected: User is authenticated and redirected to app shell
steps.observed: Redirected to / with authenticated shell and org/scenario controls visible
Organization 'fdn_cross_ui org a' created and selected

steps.expected: Scenario is created and selected in app shell

steps.action: Add first employee from Add Employee toolbar button
steps.expected: OrgChart shows a single employee node with name and title
steps.observed: OrgChart rendered one node for 'fdn_cross_ui Employee One' with title 'Software Engineer'

assertions.title: Empty states in all views before adding data

steps.action: Create and switch to empty scenario with zero employees
steps.expected: Scenario selected with no employee data
steps.observed: Scenario 'fdn_cross_ui scenario empty' selected and totals show 0

steps.action: Check OrgChart, Hierarchy, Spreadsheet, Kanban, Compare views
steps.expected: Each view shows meaningful empty state without breakage
steps.observed: OrgChart empty canvas with shell intact; Hierarchy/Spreadsheet show 'No employees match the current filters'; Kanban shows 'No employees to display'; Compare shows 'Select two scenarios to compare'

steps.action: Check browser errors during empty-view navigation

evidence.network: GET /api/scenarios/:scenarioId/employees and GET /api/orgs/:orgId/scenarios observed while loading empty views

assertions.title: New employee appears in all views without page reload

steps.action: From empty scenario, add first employee via Add Employee toolbar button
steps.expected: Employee is created in current scenario
steps.observed: Created 'fdn_cross_ui Employee Two' (QA Engineer, Engineering, Active)

steps.action: Navigate without browser refresh: OrgChart -> Hierarchy -> Spreadsheet -> Kanban
steps.expected: Each view shows same employee data
steps.observed: Employee visible in all four views with consistent title, department, and status

steps.action: Check browser errors after cross-view navigation

evidence.network: POST /api/scenarios/:scenarioId/employees followed by GET /api/scenarios/:scenarioId/employees across view transitions

frictions.description: Org/scenario creation uses native prompt dialogs; dialog value had to be pre-staged (dialog accept before click) for deterministic automation.
frictions.resolution: Queued `agent-browser dialog accept <value>` immediately before clicking New Organization/New Scenario.
